message.content:
@startuml
title US016 – As Director/PM/PO/SM, I want to view status of activities in a project

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor white
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #f0f0f0
skinparam classHeaderFontColor black
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 12
skinparam classHeaderAlignment center
skinparam classAttributeFontColor black
skinparam classMethodFontColor black
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classAttributeAlignment left
skinparam classMethodAlignment left
skinparam classAttributePadding 5
skinparam classMethodPadding 5
skinparam classAttributeMargin 0
skinparam classMethodMargin 0
skinparam classAttributeSeparator false
skinparam classMethodSeparator false
skinparam classAttributeUnderline false
skinparam classMethodUnderline false
skinparam classAttributeBold false
skinparam classMethodBold false
skinparam classAttributeItalic false
skinparam classMethodItalic false
skinparam classAttributeStrikeThrough false
skinparam classMethodStrikeThrough false
skinparam classAttributeFontName Arial
skinparam classMethodFontName Arial
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 10
skinparam classMethodFontSize 10
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle plain
skinparam classMethodFontStyle plain
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeBackgroundColor #ffffff
skinparam classMethodBackgroundColor #ffffff
skinparam classAttributeBorderColor #000000
skinparam classMethodBorderColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeBorderThickness 1
skinparam classMethodBorderThickness 1
skinparam classAttributePadding 5
skinparam classMethodPadding 5
skinparam classAttributeMargin 0
skinparam classMethodMargin 0
skinparam classAttributeSeparator false
skinparam classMethodSeparator false
skinparam classAttributeUnderline false
skinparam classMethodUnderline false
skinparam classAttributeBold false
skinparam classMethodBold false
skinparam classAttributeItalic false
skinparam classMethodItalic false
skinparam classAttributeStrikeThrough false
skinparam classMethodStrikeThrough false
skinparam classAttributeFontName Arial
skinparam classMethodFontName Arial
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 10
skinparam classMethodFontSize 10
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle plain
skinparam classMethodFontStyle plain

package "Controller" {
    class TaskUI <<C>> {
    }
    class TaskController <<C>> {
        + getStatusOfActivitiesInProject(String projectID)
    }
}

package "Service" {
    class TaskService <<C>> {
        + getStatusOfActivities(String projectID)
        - getCurrentSprintID(projectID)
        - getSbiIDs(projectID, sprintID)
        - getTasks(sbiIDs)
    }
}

package "Repository" {
    class SprintRepository <<C>> {
        + findCurrentSprintInProject(String projectID)
    }
    class SprintBacklogItemRepository <<C>> {
        + findSprintBacklogItemsInSprint(String projID, String sprintID)
    }
    class TaskRepository <<C>> {
        + findAllByContainerID(SprintBacklogItemID sbiID)
    }
}

package "Mapper" {
    class TaskMapper <<C>> {
        + statusListToDTO(List<Task> tasks)
        - statusToDTO(Task task)
    }
}

package "Domain" {
    class Task <<C>> {
        - taskID : TaskID
        - taskContainerID : TaskContainerID
        - status : TaskStatus
        - percentageOfExecution : Percentage
        - taskDescription : TaskDescription
        + getTaskID()
        + getTaskContID()
        + getStatus()
        + getPercentageOfExecution()
    }
    class SprintBacklogItemID <<C>> {
        - sbiID : UUID
        + getID()
    }
    class TaskContainerID <<I>> {
        - taskContainerID : UUID
        + getID()
    }
}

package "DTO" {
    class TaskDTO <<C>> {
        - taskID : String
        - taskContainerID : String
        - status : String
        - percentageOfExecution : int
        + getTaskID()
        + setTaskContainerID()
        + setStatus()
        + setPercentageOfExecution()
    }
}

TaskUI --> TaskController
TaskController --> TaskService
TaskService --> SprintRepository
TaskService --> SprintBacklogItemRepository
TaskService --> TaskRepository
TaskService --> TaskMapper
TaskMapper --> TaskDTO
TaskRepository ..> Task
TaskRepository ..> SprintBacklogItemID
SprintBacklogItemID ..> TaskContainerID : uses
TaskController ..> TaskDTO
TaskService ..> TaskDTO
Task ..> TaskContainerID

@enduml
